hooks.command: $g = try { Get-Content '.git' -Raw -ErrorAction Stop } catch { '' }; if ($g -match 'gitdir:\s*(.+)') { $s = [IO.Path]::GetFullPath([IO.Path]::Combine($matches[1].Trim(), '../../../.claude/hooks/worktree-auto-publish.ps1')); if (Test-Path $s) { & $s } }
hooks.statusMessage: Auto-publishing worktree changes to live site...
